graphlib/TopologicalSorter/add.name: add
graphlib/TopologicalSorter/add.description: Add a new node and its predecessors to the graph. Both the node and all elements in predecessors must be hashable. If called multiple times with the same node argument, the set of dependencies will be the union of all dependencies passed in. It is possible to add a node with no dependencies (predecessors is not provided) or to provide a dependency twice. If a node that has not been provided before is included among predecessors it will be automatically added to the graph with no predecessors ...
